_comment: Metadata about the npm publish token. Used by scripts/check-npm-token-expiry.mjs as a prepublishOnly check. Update this file every time the token rotates (the token VALUE itself lives in ~/.npmrc + .copilot-credentials.md — NEVER here).
rotationHistory: 2026-04-18 — ContextEngine-Publish-GranularApr2026 (per-package scope @compr/contextengine-mcp); expired May 19 2026; could not publish new package names in @compr
2026-06-11 — compr-scope-publish-2026-06 (scope-level on @compr, bypass-2FA on); used for the 2.0.0 rebrand publish + deprecation of @compr/contextengine-mcp
rotationNotes: https://www.npmjs.com/settings/<account>/tokens/granular-access-tokens/new — select scope @compr (NOT individual package), Read and write, ✅ Bypass two-factor authentication, 30-day expiry. Update ~/.npmrc (_authToken=) AND .copilot-credentials.md AND this file's tokenName/scope/createdAt/expiresAt. Run bash ~/Projects/backup-credentials.sh after.
